field.description: Date and time the item was added to the order
field.label: Order Items Created Week
field.name: order_items.created_week

dimensions.label: Users Country
dimensions.name: users.country
dimensions.sql:
CASE WHEN ${TABLE}.country = 'UK' THEN 'United Kingdom'
           ELSE ${TABLE}.country
           END

dimensions.description: Date and time the item was added to the order
dimensions.label: Order Items Created Year
dimensions.name: order_items.created_year

sql:
-- Did not use order_items::rollup__products_brand__products_category__products_item_name; it does not include the following fields in the query: users.state, users.country, order_items.created_year, order_items.total_sale_price, order_items.count
SELECT
    users.state  AS users_state,
    CASE WHEN users.country = 'UK' THEN 'United Kingdom'
           ELSE users.country
           END
        AS users_country,
        (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM order_items.created_at )) AS order_items_created_year,
    TRIM(products.brand)  AS products_brand,
    COALESCE(SUM(order_items.sale_price), 0) AS order_items_total_sale_price,
    COUNT(*) AS order_items_count
FROM looker-private-demo.ecomm.order_items  AS order_items
FULL OUTER JOIN looker-private-demo.ecomm.inventory_items  AS inventory_items ON inventory_items.id = order_items.inventory_item_id
LEFT JOIN looker-private-demo.ecomm.users  AS users ON order_items.user_id = users.id
LEFT JOIN looker-private-demo.ecomm.products  AS products ON products.id = inventory_items.product_id
WHERE ((( order_items.created_at  ) IS NOT NULL)) AND (users.state ) = 'California' AND LENGTH(TRIM(products.brand) ) <> 0 AND (TRIM(products.brand) ) IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    1,
    2,
    3,
    4
